<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check what applies -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tests / CI / tooling

## Checklist

<!-- Adjust based on your changes -->

- [ ] I read **[CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)** and relevant sections of **[docs/contributors.md](docs/contributors.md)** / **[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** when needed.
- [ ] **Tests:** `npm test` (and `cargo test` in `src-tauri/` if Rust changed).
- [ ] **Build:** `npm run build` succeeds.
- [ ] **AGENTS.md** updated if architecture, IPC, persistence, or agent-facing conventions changed.
